items.title_en: Malus – Clean Room as a Service
items.title_zh: Malus：洁净室即服务
items.summary_en: Malus offers a ‘clean room as a service’ model to support IP-conscious software development without exposing sensitive assets. The approach aims to balance collaboration with IP protection, appealing to teams needing controlled environments for sensitive work.
items.summary_zh: Malus 提供“洁净室即服务”的模式，帮助团队在不暴露敏感资产的前提下进行合规的软件开发。该方法力图在协作与知识产权保护之间取得平衡，适用于需要受控开发环境的场景。

items.title_en: Asia rolls out 4-day weeks, WFH to solve fuel crisis caused by Iran war
items.title_zh: 亚洲推行4天工作制和在家工作以应对因战争引发的燃料危机
items.summary_en: Some Asian economies are experimenting with shorter workweeks and remote work to reduce travel and fuel use amid fuel pressures tied to Middle East conflicts. Early pilots suggest mixed effects on productivity and energy demand.
items.summary_zh: 部分亚洲经济体正在尝试缩短工作周与远程办公，以降低出行与燃料消耗，回应中东冲突带来的能源压力。初步试点对生产力与能源需求的影响呈现出多样性。

items.title_en: Don't post generated/AI-edited comments. HN is for conversation between humans
items.title_zh: 不要发布生成的 AI 编辑评论。HN 仅供人类对话
items.summary_en: New Hacker News guidelines discourage posting comments that are AI-generated or AI-edited. The rule emphasizes preserving authentic human discussion, signal quality, and accountability in community conversations. This matters as AI-assisted writing becomes more common on forums, potentially diluting discourse if not checked.
items.summary_zh: 这条规则强调保持社区讨论的真实人类对话，避免 AI 辅助或编辑的评论影响质感。随着 AI 写作工具日益普及，平台和用户将面临如何维护讨论质量和可追责性的问题。

items.title_en: Bubble Sorted Amen Break
items.title_zh: 冒泡排序版 Amen Break
items.summary_en: A playful audio project applies bubble-sort to the Amen Break, producing evolving, glitchy variants as elements swap positions. It’s a creative fusion of algorithmic thinking and music that invites exploration of generative sound.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个将冒泡排序应用到 Amen Break 的创意音频项目，随着元素逐步交换，音轨不断演变，产生 glitch 风格的变体。它将算法思维与音乐相结合，值得探索其生成音效的过程。

items.title_en: Italian prosecutors seek trial for Amazon, 4 execs in alleged $1.4B tax evasion
items.title_zh: 意大利检方就亚马逊及4名高管涉14亿美元逃税提起审判
items.summary_en: Italian prosecutors pursue a trial against Amazon and four executives over alleged multi-billion euro tax evasion, highlighting ongoing EU scrutiny of tech giants and tax strategy.
items.summary_zh: 意大利检方就亚马逊及4名高管涉多亿欧元逃税提起审判，凸显欧盟对科技巨头及税务策略的持续审查。

items.title_en: Kotlin creator's new language: a formal way to talk to LLMs instead of English
items.title_zh: Kotlin 创作者的新语言：用结构化语言对话而非英语与 LLM 交流
items.summary_en: A new language aims to formalize prompts and interactions with large language models, reducing ambiguity and improving reproducibility beyond natural language.
items.summary_zh: 一种新语言旨在将与大模型的交互形式化，减少歧义并提升可重复性，超越纯自然语言的表达。

items.title_en: ATMs didn't kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did
items.title_zh: ATM 没杀死出纳员工作，但 iPhone 做到了
items.summary_en: A look at how mobile banking and smartphones reshaped consumer behavior and staffing beyond ATM adoption. The broader automation shift continues to redefine frontline roles and service models.
items.summary_zh: 探讨移动银行和智能手机如何重塑消费行为与人员配置，超越单纯的 ATM 使用。更广泛的自动化转型正在重新定义前线岗位和服务模式。

items.title_en: Suburban school district uses license plate readers to verify student residency
items.title_zh: 郊区学区利用车牌识别器核验学生居住地
items.summary_en: A suburban district deploys license-plate readers to verify student residency, a prerequisite for in-district enrollment funding. The move raises privacy and civil-liberties concerns about mass surveillance, even as administrators cite efficiency and compliance gains.
items.summary_zh: 一所郊区学区部署车牌识别系统以核实学生居住地，这是在校就读资格与拨款的前提。尽管管理方声称提高合规性与入学核验效率，此举也引发大规模监控下的隐私与公民自由担忧。

items.title_en: Apple's MacBook Neo makes repairs easier and cheaper than other MacBooks
items.title_zh: 苹果 MacBook Neo：更易维修、成本更低的模块化设计
items.summary_en: MacBook Neo adopts a more repair-friendly modular design, reducing repair costs and downtime compared to other Apple laptops. The architecture signals a broader hardware shift toward serviceability.
items.summary_zh: MacBook Neo 采用更易维修的模块化设计，维修成本和停机时间较其他苹果笔记本更低。这一架构预示着硬件设计向可维护性的方向发展。

items.title_en: Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
items.title_zh: Claude 现在能创建交互式图表、图解和可视化
items.summary_en: Claude can generate live visuals such as charts and diagrams, expanding its utility beyond text to aid data storytelling and analysis.
items.summary_zh: Claude 现在可以生成互动图表、图解和可视化，拓展了其在数据讲述与分析中的应用。

items.title_en: The Met Releases High-Def 3D Scans of 140 Famous Art Objects
items.title_zh: 大都会博物馆发布140件著名艺术品的高精度3D扫描
items.summary_en: The Met releases high-definition 3D scans of 140 masterpieces, enabling researchers and the public to explore works in interactive detail. This move could expand art education, provenance research, and digital preservation opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 大都会博物馆公开了140件杰作的高分辨率3D扫描，供研究者和公众以互动方式深入欣赏。此举有望扩大艺术教育、留存性研究和数字化保存的机会。

items.title_en: Reversing memory loss via gut-brain communication
items.title_zh: 通过肠脑通讯逆转记忆衰退
items.summary_en: New research highlights the gut-brain axis as a lever against cognitive decline, showing signals from the gut can influence memory processes. While early, the work strengthens the case for microbiome-targeted therapies to support brain health.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究强调肠-脑轴在对抗认知下降中的作用，显示肠道信号能影响记忆过程。尽管处于早期阶段，这些发现为以肠道微生物为靶点的脑健康干预提供了支持。

items.title_en: Big Data on the Cheapest MacBook
items.title_zh: 在最便宜的MacBook上进行大数据处理
items.summary_en: DuckDB demonstrates running analytics workloads on a budget MacBook, showing how consumer hardware can handle practical data tasks with local processing. While feasible for light-to-moderate datasets, RAM and storage limits still bound scale.
items.summary_zh: DuckDB 展示了在经济型 MacBook 上运行分析工作负载，展示了消费级硬件在本地处理数据的可行性。对于轻至中等数据量虽可实现，但受限于RAM与存储，规模化仍有约束。

items.title_en: US banks' exposure to private credit hits $300B (2025)
items.title_zh: 美国银行对私募信贷敞口达3000亿美元（2025）
items.summary_en: U.S. banks hold roughly $300 billion in private credit exposures in 2025, reflecting a surge in non-bank lending. This growth expands banks’ balance-sheet risk into opaque, less-regulated markets, prompting regulators and investors to watch for liquidity shocks and correlated credit cycles.
items.summary_zh: 截至2025年，美国银行在私募信贷上的敞口约为3000亿美元，体现私募债市场的快速扩张。银行风险正向不透明、监管较松的市场渗透，监管方与投资者将关注潜在的流动性冲击和信用周期相关风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: OneCLI – Vault for AI Agents in Rust
items.title_zh: Show HN: OneCLI — 用 Rust 实现的 AI 代理密钥库
items.summary_en: OneCLI presents a Vault-like CLI for AI agents built in Rust, focusing on secure secret management and shareable credentials across tasks. It aims to simplify reproducible AI workflows and bolster security in automation.
items.summary_zh: OneCLI 提供一个用 Rust 实现、类似 Vault 的 AI 代理密钥管理 CLI，侧重安全地管理秘密并在任务间共享凭证。目标是简化可重复的 AI 工作流并提升自动化安全性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Rudel – Claude Code Session Analytics
items.title_zh: Show HN: Rudel — Claude 代码会话分析工具
items.summary_en: Rudel analyzes Claude sessions to reveal code reasoning, efficiency, and potential biases. It helps teams understand how AI assists coding tasks and where improvements are needed.
items.summary_zh: Rudel 对 Claude 的对话会话进行分析，揭示代码推理、效率与潜在偏差。帮助团队评估 AI 辅助编码任务的效果与改进点。

items.title_en: Dolphin Progress Release 2603
items.title_zh: Dolphin 进展发布 2603
items.summary_en: Dolphin Emulator’s 2603 progress release brings fixes and performance tweaks across Wii and GameCube emulation. Expect improved accuracy, better input handling, and shader-related stability on various hosts, underscoring continued community-led refinement.
items.summary_zh: Dolphin Emulator 的2603进展发布带来Wii/ GameCube 模拟的修复与性能优化。预计在输入处理、着色器稳定性等方面提升，并提升在不同主机上的兼容性，体现社区持续改进的精神。

items.title_en: Show HN: Understudy – Teach a desktop agent by demonstrating a task once
items.title_zh: Show HN: Understudy — 通过一次演示教会桌面自动化代理
items.summary_en: Understudy lets you demonstrate a task once and teach a desktop agent to repeat it across apps. This approach could dramatically accelerate building practical automation without scripting.
items.summary_zh: Understudy 允许通过一次演示来教会桌面代理在跨应用中重复执行任务。这种方法可能极大地加速无脚本的实际自动化构建。

items.title_en: US private credit defaults hit record 9.2% in 2025, Fitch says
items.title_zh: 据称2025年美国私募信贷违约率创纪录达到9.2%
items.summary_en: Fitch reports private-credit defaults reached 9.2% in 2025, signaling stress in leveraged loan markets and potential spillovers to banks via exposures. The data underscores risk in non-bank lending sectors and the need for prudent risk management.
items.summary_zh: 费奇称2025年美国私募信贷违约率达到9.2%，显示杠杆贷款市场承压，且敞口可能对银行产生传导效应。该数据凸显非银行放贷领域的风险，并强调审慎的风险管理需求。

items.title_en: Returning to Rails in 2026
items.title_zh: 在 2026 年重新拥抱 Rails
items.summary_en: Rails remains a viable, productive choice in 2026 as tooling and the ecosystem mature. The piece argues that Rails' conventions, now complemented by modern tooling and frontend patterns, keep it relevant for building maintainable apps quickly. The takeaway is that Rails is still worth considering for new projects on modern stacks.
items.summary_zh: 到了 2026 年，Rails 仍然是高效的开发选择，生态与工具链日渐成熟。文章认为 Rails 的约定优于配置的特性在现今的现代化工具和前端模式下依然有用，能帮助快速构建可维护的应用。结论是，新的项目仍然值得在现代技术栈上考虑 Rails。

items.title_en: 1B identity records exposed in ID verification data leak
items.title_zh: 在身份验证数据泄露中曝光10亿身份记录
items.summary_en: A data leak exposed 1 billion identity records in ID verification data, underscoring privacy risks and the need for data minimization, encryption, and robust access controls in identity ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 一次数据泄露暴露了十亿条身份验证记录，凸显身份生态中隐私风险，并强调数据最小化、加密与严格访问控制的重要性。

items.title_en: Avoiding Trigonometry (2013)
items.title_zh: 避免三角函数（2013）
items.summary_en: Iñigo Quilez shows how many trig-based results can be computed without actual trig calls, using algebraic identities and approximations. The techniques matter for shader writers seeking higher performance without sacrificing visual fidelity.
items.summary_zh: Iñigo Quilez 展示了许多涉及三角函数的结果可以不用实际三角函数调用来计算，借助代数恒等和近似。对于追求高性能着色器并保持视觉效果的开发者尤为重要。

items.title_en: 3D-Knitting: The Ultimate Guide
items.title_zh: 3D针织：终极指南
items.summary_en: 3D knitting blends digital design with fabric fabrication; this guide covers materials, machines, and end-to-end workflows from design to knit. It highlights how additive textile manufacturing enables rapid prototyping and customized textiles.
items.summary_zh: 3D 针织将数字设计与织物制造结合起来；本指南介绍材料、设备与从设计到成品的全流程。它强调数字化纺织在快速原型和定制化织物中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: U.S. to suspend the Jones Act in a bid to curb oil prices
items.title_zh: 为抑制油价，美国拟暂停琼斯法案
items.summary_en: The U.S. weighs temporarily suspending the Jones Act to ease shipping costs and oil prices, with potential implications for energy markets and domestic supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 美国正考虑在短期内暂停琼斯法案以缓解船运成本和油价，可能对能源市场和国内供应链产生影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Axe – A 12MB binary that replaces your AI framework
items.title_zh: Show HN：Axe A 12MB 二进制可替代AI框架
items.summary_en: A 12MB binary claims to replace a full AI framework, illustrating a push toward ultra-compact, self-contained AI components. While intriguing, real-world performance, tooling support, and ecosystem compatibility remain critical questions.
items.summary_zh: 一个12MB的二进制声称可替代完整的AI框架，体现了向极简、独立AI组件演进的趋势。尽管吸引眼球，实际性能、工具链与生态兼容性仍是关键考量。

items.title_en: Temporal: The 9-year journey to fix time in JavaScript
items.title_zh: Temporal：用九年修复 JavaScript 的时间处理
items.summary_en: Temporal introduces a robust API for dates, times, and time zones intended to replace Date in JavaScript. The article traces nearly a decade of design iterations, trade-offs, and ecosystem debates, underscoring how hard robust time handling is.
items.summary_zh: Temporal 提供用于日期、时间和时区的强健 API，旨在替代内置 Date。九年的设计迭代与取舍凸显了在时间处理上的复杂性，以及对生态系统的深远影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: s@: decentralized social networking over static sites
items.title_zh: Show HN：s@：在静态站点上实现去中心化社交网络
items.summary_en: s@ enables a decentralized social network built on static sites, reducing reliance on server backends while preserving federation. The approach highlights how lightweight hosting and user-owned content can scale with simple publishing pipelines.
items.summary_zh: s@ 将去中心化社交网络落地在静态站点之上，降低对后端服务器的依赖，同时实现内容的去中心化拥有。该做法展示了轻量托管和可扩展的发布流程在去中心化网络中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Tony Hoare has died
items.title_zh: 托尼·霍尔去世
items.summary_en: Renowned computer scientist Tony Hoare passed away, leaving a lasting legacy in formal methods, algorithm theory, and programming language design. His work, including Hoare logic and CSP, underpins modern verification, concurrency theory, and software correctness discussions.
items.summary_zh: 著名计算机科学家托尼·霍尔去世，正式方法、算法理论和编程语言设计方面的贡献深远。他提出的霍尔逻辑和 CSP 等奠定了现代形式化验证、并发理论与软件正确性讨论的基石。

items.title_en: Certbot and Let's Encrypt Now Support IP Address Certificates
items.title_zh: Certbot 与 Let's Encrypt 现支持 IP 地址证书
items.summary_en: The ACME ecosystem now supports certificates issued to IP addresses, enabling TLS for servers reachable by IP alone and broadening testing and edge-use cases.
items.summary_zh: ACME 生态系统现支持对 IP 地址颁发证书，使通过 IP 直接访问的服务器也能使用 TLS，扩展了测试和边缘场景应用。

items.title_en: Iran-backed hackers claim wiper attack on medtech firm Stryker
items.title_zh: 伊朗支持的黑客声称对医疗技术公司 Stryker 发动抹除式攻击
items.summary_en: Iran-linked hackers claim a wiper-style intrusion against medical device maker Stryker, signaling potentially disruptive cyber-attacks against healthcare tech. The report underscores the need for resilient backups, segmentation, and incident response to mitigate wipe-based intrusions in critical supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 据称伊朗支持的黑客对医疗设备厂商 Stryker 发动抹除式攻击，可能影响医疗领域的网络安全态势。此事凸显对医疗科技供应链的潜在风险，强调加强备份、网络分段和事件响应的重要性。

items.title_en: Iranian Hacktivists Strike Medical Device Maker Stryker and Wiped Systems
items.title_zh: 伊朗黑客行动者袭击医疗器械制造商 Stryker 并清除系统
items.summary_en: Iranian hacktivists reportedly attacked Stryker, a medical-device maker, with system wipes, underscoring cyber-attack risks in healthcare supply chains. The incident highlights persistent geopolitical cyber tensions and resilience requirements for medical tech firms.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，伊朗黑客行动者入侵医疗器械厂商 Stryker 并清除系统，凸显医疗供应链中的网络攻击风险。事件反映持续的地缘政治网络冲突以及对医疗科技企业的韧性要求。

items.title_en: Emacs internals: Tagged pointers vs. C++ std:variant and LLVM (Part 3)
items.title_zh: 传 Emacs 内部实现：Tagged 指针 vs C++ std::variant 与 LLVM（第3部分）
items.summary_en: This third installment examines how Emacs represents data with tagged pointers and compares that approach to C++ std::variant and LLVM representations. The piece digs into memory layout, performance trade-offs, and interoperability concerns.
items.summary_zh: 本系列第三部分比较了 Emacs 使用的标记指针与 C++ std::variant、LLVM 表示法在内存布局、性能权衡与互操作性方面的差异。

items.title_en: DHS Contracts Explorer – Hacked data from the Office of Industry Partnership
items.title_zh: DHS 合同探索器：产业伙伴办公室数据被黑
items.summary_en: A dataset containing contract information from a DHS office appears after a security incident. The disclosure shines a light on sensitive procurement data and the ongoing importance of supply-chain security in government operations.
items.summary_zh: 公开的数据集暴露了国土安全部产业伙伴办公室的合同信息，源自一次安全事件。此事凸显政府采购数据的敏感性以及供应链安全的重要性。

items.title_en: The Road Not Taken: A World Where IPv4 Evolved
items.title_zh: 未走的路：IPv4 演化的另一种可能
items.summary_en: An exploration of alternate histories for IPv4’s evolution, offering lessons for network design, routing, and potential future internet architectures.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 IPv4 漏轨演化的另一种历史路径，为网络设计、路由选择及未来互联网架构提供启示。

items.title_en: WolfIP: Lightweight TCP/IP stack with no dynamic memory allocations
items.title_zh: WolfIP：无动态内存分配的轻量级 TCP/IP 栈
items.summary_en: WolfIP is a compact TCP/IP stack designed for constrained environments, avoiding dynamic memory to improve predictability and safety in embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: WolfIP 是一个面向资源受限环境的轻量级 TCP/IP 栈，避免动态内存分配，以提升嵌入式系统的可预测性和安全性。

items.title_en: I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job
items.title_zh: 我被 AI 机器人面试了一份工作
items.summary_en: An applicant recounts being interviewed by an AI bot for a job, illustrating how automated interviewing tools are entering hiring. It raises questions about bias, evaluation transparency, and how far automation should override human judgment in candidate assessment.
items.summary_zh: 应聘者讲述自己被 AI 机器人面试的经历，展示了自动化招聘工具在招聘流程中的渗透。此事引发对偏见、评估透明度以及在候选人评估中让自动化替代人工判断的边界等问题的讨论。

items.title_en: 'I am blown away by it,' Ex-Windows Chief calls MacBook Neo 'paradigm-shifting'
items.title_zh: 前 Windows 主管称 MacBook Neo 是‘范式转变’
items.summary_en: A former Windows lead calls the MacBook Neo paradigm-shifting, highlighting its modular design and efficiency. The praise underscores a wider hardware design shift toward repairability.
items.summary_zh: 前 Windows 主管称 MacBook Neo 是“范式转变”，强调其模块化设计与高效性能，反映出向可维修性更强的硬件设计转变的趋势。

items.title_en: Long Overlooked as Crucial to Life, Fungi Start to Get Their Due
items.title_zh: 长期被忽视的生命关键——真菌开始获得关注
items.summary_en: A feature highlighting fungi’s critical roles in ecosystems, medicine, and industry, arguing for more research and recognition of their significance to life on Earth.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦真菌在生态系统、医学与工业中的关键作用，呼吁加大研究和对真菌重要性的认知。

items.title_en: SBCL: A Sanely-Bootstrappable Common Lisp (2008) [pdf]
items.title_zh: SBCL：一个可理智自举的 Common Lisp（2008） [pdf]
items.summary_en: SBCL’s bootstrap-friendly design balances portability and performance. The 2008 paper delves into bootstrapping choices, compiler integration, and how to make a Lisp system practical across platforms.
items.summary_zh: SBCL 的自举友好设计在可移植性与性能之间取得平衡。2008 年的论文探讨了自举选择、编译器集成，以及如何让 Lisp 系统在多平台上保持实用性。

items.title_en: Create value for others and don’t worry about the returns
items.title_zh: 为他人创造价值，别过分担心回报
items.summary_en: A mindset shift that values creating real utility for others over chasing immediate financial returns. The piece urges builders to focus on impact, open collaboration, and sustainable practices rather than ROI alone.
items.summary_zh: 强调把为他人创造实用价值放在首位，而不是只追逐短期回报。文章倡导专注于影响力、开放协作和可持续做法，而非单纯看 ROI。

items.title_en: The MacBook Neo
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo
items.summary_en: An opinion piece examines the concept and implications of a 'MacBook Neo'—how new design choices, feature trade-offs, and product positioning might reshape Apple's laptop line and user expectations. It considers where Apple might innovate versus where customers will expect continuity in performance, ports, and battery life.
items.summary_zh: 一篇评论性文章探讨了“MacBook Neo”这一概念及其影响，讨论新的设计取舍和产品定位如何可能重塑苹果笔记本系列与用户预期。文章权衡了苹果可能带来的创新与用户对性能、接口和续航连续性的期望。

items.title_en: Reliable Software in the LLM Era
items.title_zh: LLM 时代的可靠软件
items.summary_en: Building reliable software amid reliance on large language models requires repeatable tests, reproducible outcomes, and safe interfaces for AI components. The piece surveys strategies for maintaining software quality in AI-assisted ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 在依赖大语言模型的环境中构建可靠软件，需要可重复的测试、可复现的结果和对AI组件的安全接口。文中概述了在AI驱动的生态系统中保持软件质量的策略。

items.title_en: Many SWE-bench-Passing PRs would not be merged
items.title_zh: 大量通过 SWE 基准的 PR 可能无法直接合并
items.summary_en: A note arguing that many pull requests that pass standard SWE benchmarks would not actually be merged into main. For developers, this suggests focusing beyond metrics to ensure robust, production-ready changes.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，许多通过常规软件工程基准测试的 PR 实际上可能无法合并到主分支。指标可能掩盖真实的质量与集成风险，强调对代码的可维护性和生产就绪性的关注比单纯追求分数更重要。

items.title_en: Britain is ejecting hereditary nobles from Parliament after 700 years
items.title_zh: 英国从议会中驱逐700年传统的世袭贵族
items.summary_en: Britain expels hereditary peers from Parliament after centuries of status, marking a historic reform in the House of Lords composition. The move reshapes legislative dynamics and optics for tech policy, including reforms tied to governance of AI and science funding. The change could influence elite networks influencing tech policy.
items.summary_zh: 英国宣布从上院驱逐拥有世袭头衔的贵族，结束持续数百年的传统。这一改革改变了议会组成及其在科技、治理与创新资助方面的影响力格局，或将影响未来科技政策的制定。

items.title_en: Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web
items.title_zh: 让 WebAssembly 成为 Web 上的一等语言
items.summary_en: Efforts to make WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web focus on richer runtime features—like GC, component model, interface types, and better debugging—to let high-level languages interoperate and be authored for the browser without forcing JavaScript as the only host. If successful, this work would broaden language choice for web apps, improve performance portability, and unlock tooling and deployment patterns closer to native languages.
items.summary_zh: 将 WebAssembly 打造成 Web 上的一等语言需要补齐运行时功能（如垃圾回收、组件模型、接口类型和更好的调试支持），以便高阶语言能无缝互操作并原生面向浏览器。若能实现，这将扩展网页的语言选择、提升性能可移植性，并带来更接近本地开发的工具链和部署方式。

items.title_en: Contextual commits – An open standard for capturing the why in Git history
items.title_zh: Contextual commits：在 Git 历史中记录原因的开放标准
items.summary_en: A proposal for standardized contextual commits that capture the rationale behind changes, improving traceability and collaboration in software projects.
items.summary_zh: 提出一种记录变更原因的标准化“情境提交”标准，提升软件项目的可追溯性与协作效率。

items.title_en: How we hacked McKinsey's AI platform
items.title_zh: 我们如何破解麦肯锡的 AI 平台
items.summary_en: An exposé on vulnerabilities found in McKinsey's AI platform, outlining methods used to bypass protections and what defenders can learn.
items.summary_zh: 揭示麦肯锡 AI 平台中的安全漏洞，描述攻破防护的手段以及对防守者的启示。强调了企业级 AI 堆栈的安全风险，以及在设计、访问控制与责任披露方面的最佳实践。

items.title_en: Lego's 0.002mm specification and its implications for manufacturing (2025)
items.title_zh: 乐高 0.002mm 规格及其对制造业的启示（2025）
items.summary_en: LEGO's astonishingly tight tolerances—on the order of microns—are a core part of why its bricks interlock reliably after decades and across suppliers. That level of specification forces disciplined manufacturing, quality control, and supplier coordination, and the analysis shows how tight tolerances can drive product longevity, modularity, and the economics of precision mass production.
items.summary_zh: 乐高极其严格的公差（精确到微米量级）是其积木几十年后仍能可靠互锁的关键。如此精细的规格要求严格的制造与质量控制以及供应商协同，说明高精度公差如何推动产品耐久性、模块化以及精密大规模生产的经济性。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a tool that watches webpages and exposes changes as RSS
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个监视网页并把变化曝露为 RSS 的工具
items.summary_en: This tool watches web pages for changes and exposes detected updates as RSS feeds, letting users integrate page monitoring into existing feed readers and automation pipelines. It's a lightweight solution for tracking content that lacks native feeds or APIs, useful for alerts, scraping alternatives, and simple change detection.
items.summary_zh: 该工具监视网页变化并将检测到的更新以 RSS 形式输出，便于用户在现有阅读器或自动化流程中集成监控。它是跟踪缺少原生订阅或 API 的内容的轻量方案，适合用于警报、替代抓取及简单变更检测。

items.title_en: BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs
items.title_zh: 微软 BitNet：用于本地 CPU 的 1000 亿参数 1 位模型
items.summary_en: Microsoft's BitNet packs a 100B-parameter model into a 1-bit representation aimed at running on local CPUs, trading precision for dramatic reductions in memory and bandwidth. If effective, this approach could broaden access to large models without GPUs, but will hinge on inference quality, latency, and compatibility with existing stacks.
items.summary_zh: 微软的 BitNet 将 1000 亿参数模型压缩为 1 位表示，目标是在本地 CPU 上运行以大幅降低内存和带宽需求。该方案若能在精度和延迟上取得平衡，可能让无需 GPU 的设备也能使用大模型，但最终效果取决于推理质量和软件生态兼容性。

items.title_en: Lf-lean: The frontier of verified software engineering
items.title_zh: Lf-lean：验证软件工程的前沿
items.summary_en: Lf-lean discusses frontier ideas in verified software engineering, blending formal methods, tooling, and scalable verification to improve software correctness.
items.summary_zh: Lf-lean 讨论验证软件工程的前沿，结合形式方法、工具与可扩展验证以提升软件正确性。

items.title_en: Google closes deal to acquire Wiz
items.title_zh: Google 完成对 Wiz 的收购
items.summary_en: Google closes its deal to acquire Wiz, a cloud security startup, signaling a tilt toward integrated security tooling within Google Cloud. The acquisition could accelerate Wiz's security posture automation and threat detection capabilities across Google’s cloud platform, affecting customers and competing vendors.
items.summary_zh: 此次交易将 Wiz 的威胁检测与合规自动化能力更深地整合到 Google Cloud，影响现有客户与竞争对手的表现。

items.title_en: Entities enabling scientific fraud at scale (2025)
items.title_zh: 大规模促成科学欺诈的实体（2025）
items.summary_en: A 2025 paper identifies entities that enable scientific fraud at scale, shedding light on systemic weaknesses in research ecosystems. The findings underscore the need for stronger data transparency, audit trails, and incentives to deter misconduct across institutions and publishers.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 2025 年的论文揭示了在大规模层面促成科学欺诈的实体，暴露了研究生态中的系统性弱点。研究强调需要加强数据透明、审计机制以及避免不端行为的激励结构，以保护科研可信度。

items.title_en: USDA is closing buildings, relocating staff, and downsizing-a lot
items.title_zh: USDA 正在大量关闭建筑、重新安置员工并缩减规模
items.summary_en: The USDA is downsizing through facility closures and staff relocations, signaling budgetary pressure and structural changes within the agency. The shifts could affect rural development programs and service delivery.
items.summary_zh: USDA 正在通过关闭设施、重新安置员工来缩减规模，反映预算压力与机构结构调整。此举或影响农村发展计划及公共服务的交付。

items.title_en: Personal Computer by Perplexity
items.title_zh: Perplexity 的个人计算机
items.summary_en: Perplexity unveils or invites waitlist for Personal Computer, signaling a move toward integrating AI-enabled search and natural language interfaces into a consumer PC. If realized, this could reshape how users interact with apps, potentially fusing AI copilots with hardware.
items.summary_zh: Perplexity 推出个人计算机产品的候选概念/待列。若落地，可能把 AI 搜索和自然语言界面直接整合到日常计算机中，改变用户对应用的交互方式，并带来硬件层面的创新。

items.title_en: Faster asin() was hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 更快的 asin() 原来一直显而易见
items.summary_en: A math/engineering post reveals a simpler, faster algorithm for computing asin() by exploiting identities and low-cost approximations that were previously overlooked. The trick yields measurable speedups in numerical libraries and graphics code, though users must weigh performance gains against precision and edge-case behavior.
items.summary_zh: 一篇技术文章展示了利用数学恒等式和廉价近似可以实现更快的 asin() 计算方法，这些手法此前被忽视。该技巧能在数值库和图形代码中带来显著加速，但在使用时需要在性能提升与精度、边界情况之间权衡。

items.title_en: ArcaOS 5.1.2 (based on OS/2 Warp 4.52) now available
items.title_zh: ArcaOS 5.1.2（基于OS/2 Warp 4.52）现已可用
items.summary_en: ArcaOS 5.1.2, built on OS/2 Warp 4.52, brings updated drivers and compatibility for retro but still-relevant OS tooling. It serves niche users who rely on legacy environments still in operation.
items.summary_zh: ArcaOS 5.1.2 基于 OS/2 Warp 4.52 的更新版本，提供改进的驱动与兼容性，面向仍在使用遗留系统的爱好者和企业用户。

items.title_en: Show HN: A context-aware permission guard for Claude Code
items.title_zh: Show HN：为 Claude Code 提供上下文感知的权限保护
items.summary_en: nah is a context-aware permission guard for Claude Code that helps control what prompts and data the AI can access based on project context. It demonstrates how developer tools can enforce privacy and scope in AI-assisted coding.
items.summary_zh: nah 是一个面向 Claude Code 的上下文感知权限保护工具，能根据当前项目上下文限制 AI 的访问权限与提示信息。展示了在 AI 辅助编码中强化隐私与作用域控制的可行路径。

items.title_en: Apple releases iOS 15.8.7 to fix Coruna exploit for iPhone 6S from 2015
items.title_zh: 苹果发布 iOS 15.8.7 修复 Coruna 漏洞，影响 iPhone 6S（2015）
items.summary_en: Apple released iOS 15.8.7 to fix a Coruna exploit impacting older devices like iPhone 6S. The update underscores ongoing security maintenance for legacy hardware and the challenges of patching long-tail devices.
items.summary_zh: 苹果发布 iOS 15.8.7 修复 Coruna 漏洞，影响老款设备如 iPhone 6S。此举凸显对遗留硬件的持续安全维护与打补丁在长尾设备上的挑战。

items.title_en: How much of HN is AI?
items.title_zh: 有多少 Hacker News 内容是 AI？
items.summary_en: A Substack analysis estimates the share of AI-focused content on Hacker News, revealing a surge in AI topics that shape discussions, funding, and product priorities. It helps readers calibrate how much AI pervades tech discourse.
items.summary_zh: 一篇 Substack 分析估算 Hacker News 上与 AI 相关内容的比例，揭示 AI 话题的激增正在引导讨论、资金和产品优先级。帮助读者把握社区对 AI 的关注度。

items.title_en: Swiss e-voting pilot can't count 2,048 ballots after decryption failure
items.title_zh: 瑞士电子投票试点因解密失败无法计数 2,048 张选票
items.summary_en: A Swiss e‑voting pilot failed to decrypt 2,048 ballots, meaning those votes couldn't be automatically tallied and raising questions about the reliability and auditability of the system. The incident underscores the fragility of end-to-end electronic voting workflows and the need for robust fallback and transparent verification mechanisms.
items.summary_zh: 一项瑞士电子投票试点在解密过程中失败，导致 2,048 张选票无法自动计票，暴露了系统可靠性与可审计性问题。该事件凸显端到端电子投票流程的脆弱性，强调了健全回退方案与透明验证机制的必要性。

items.title_en: Urea prices
items.title_zh: 尿素价格
items.summary_en: Global urea prices are moving in response to fertilizer demand, gas feedstock costs, and supply constraints, impacting farmers and agro. The article traces price drivers and implications for crop yields and input budgeting.
items.summary_zh: 全球尿素价格受化肥需求、天然气成本与供应紧张等因素影响，直接关系到农民成本和投入预算。文章梳理了价格驱动因素及对农业的潜在影响。

items.title_en: U.S. Navy Turns Down Hormuz Escort Requests Because of High Risk
items.title_zh: 美军因高风险拒绝霍尔木兹海峡护航请求
items.summary_en: The U.S. Navy declines escort requests through Hormuz due to elevated risk, illustrating the real-world limits of military commitments and the cascading effects on regional security and global energy flows.
items.summary_zh: 美军因高风险拒绝通过霍尔木兹海峡的护航请求，揭示军事承诺的现实边界及其对区域安全与全球能源流动的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Klaus – OpenClaw on a VM, batteries included
items.title_zh: Show HN：Klaus — 在虚拟机上运行 OpenClaw 的开箱即用方案
items.summary_en: Klaus packages OpenClaw into a VM image with everything preconfigured so you can run the system locally with minimal setup. It lowers the barrier to experimenting with the project by bundling dependencies, example datasets, and management tools, making it handy for demos, learning, or isolated deployments—though it'll still demand VM resources.
items.summary_zh: Klaus 将 OpenClaw 打包为开箱即用的虚拟机镜像，包含预配置环境以便快速本地运行。它通过捆绑依赖、示例数据集和管理工具，降低试验门槛，适合演示、学习或隔离部署，但仍需要相应的虚拟机资源。

items.title_en: WireGuard Is Two Things
items.title_zh: WireGuard 的两件事
items.summary_en: WireGuard is presented as two integral aspects: a lean, modern VPN protocol with strong cryptography, and a practical, easily deployable implementation.
items.summary_zh: 文中将 WireGuard 视为两件事：一方面是简洁而强健的现代 VPN 协议，另一方面是易于部署的实用实现。讨论了这一双重特性对部署、安全性以及实际应用的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built an SDK that scrambles HTML so scrapers get garbage
items.title_zh: Show HN：我构建了一个 SDK 将 HTML 混乱，导致爬虫获取垃圾数据
items.summary_en: An SDK designed to scramble HTML to thwart scrapers illustrates anti-scraping approaches and the tensions between data access and protection. It raises questions about practicality, legality, and the future of data pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 一个旨在通过混淆HTML来阻止爬虫的SDK，展示了反爬虫技术及数据获取与保护之间的博弈。引发关于实用性、合规性及数据管道未来的讨论。

items.title_en: Physicist Astrid Eichhorn is a leader in the field of asymptotic safety
items.title_zh: 物理学家 Astrid Eichhorn 是渐近安全领域的领军人物
items.summary_en: Physicist Astrid Eichhorn is a leader in asymptotic safety, a programmatic approach to quantum gravity.
items.summary_zh: 她的工作聚焦量子引力的可预测性与时空自相似结构，渐近安全提供了一条可能不需弦理论也能实现自洽量子引力的路径。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-source browser for AI agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：开源的 AI 代理浏览器
items.summary_en: This open-source project defines a browser protocol and interface for running, visualizing, and interacting with autonomous AI agents inside the browser. By standardizing agent communications and providing a UI, it makes experimentation with multiple-agent setups and debugging easier for developers building agent-based systems.
items.summary_zh: 该开源项目为在浏览器中运行、可视化和交互的自治 AI 代理定义了协议与界面。通过规范代理通信并提供用户界面，它让开发者更方便地实验多代理配置并调试基于代理的系统。

items.title_en: Show HN: Vanilla JavaScript refinery simulator built to explain job to my kids
items.title_zh: Show HN：用纯 JavaScript 写成的炼油厂模拟器，用来向孩子解释我的工作
items.summary_en: A browser-based refinery simulator, written in vanilla JavaScript, models core processes so kids can visually explore how a refinery works through interactive components and simplified flows. It's a good example of using small, focused simulations to teach complex industrial systems in an approachable way.
items.summary_zh: 这个用纯 JavaScript 实现的浏览器炼油厂模拟器通过交互式组件和简化流程让孩子直观探索炼油工作原理。它示范了用小型、针对性的模拟来以易懂方式教授复杂工业系统的有效方法。

items.title_en: Show HN: Autoresearch@home
items.title_zh: Show HN：居家自动化研究（Autoresearch@home）
items.summary_en: A project that enables automated AI-assisted research workflows at home, showcasing how small teams or individuals can run reproducible experiments without centralized infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 一个在家中就可运行的自动化研究工作流工具，展示了个人或小团队如何在无需中心化基础设施的情况下进行可重复的实验。

items.title_en: Show HN: Calyx – Ghostty-Based macOS Terminal with Liquid Glass UI
items.title_zh: Show HN：Calyx——基于 Ghostty 的 macOS 终端，具 Liquid Glass UI
items.summary_en: Calyx reimagines the macOS terminal with a Ghostty-based foundation and a glassy Liquid Glass UI for a modern, tactile feel. It demonstrates how terminal apps are evolving beyond plain text to deliver rich, responsive UX.
items.summary_zh: Calyx 以 Ghostty 为底层、具备 Liquid Glass 风格界面的 macOS 终端，呈现现代化、具粘性体验的用户界面。展示了终端应用在文本之外追求更丰富、响应式用户体验的趋势。

items.title_en: Nagle's Algorithm
items.title_zh: Nagle 算法
items.summary_en: Nagle's algorithm reduces TCP overhead by buffering small packets, trading latency for efficiency. The discussion covers how and when to disable it for low-latency interactive applications.
items.summary_zh: Nagle 算法通过对小包进行缓冲来降低 TCP 开销，在效率与延迟之间进行权衡。讨论涉及在低延迟交互场景中何时禁用此算法。

items.title_en: Preliminary data from a longitudinal AI impact study
items.title_zh: AI 影响研究的初步数据
items.summary_en: A preview of longitudinal study data on AI impact shows productivity gains around 10%, with substantial variance across domains, roles, and tasks. The findings suggest AI adoption yields modest-but-real gains, not universal leaps.
items.summary_zh: 长期研究的初步数据表明，AI 对生产力的提升大致在 10% 左右，且因领域、岗位和任务差异显著。结论显示 AI 的影响是温和但真实的，而非一概而定的飞跃。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built an ISP infrastructure emulator from scratch with a custom vBNG
items.title_zh: Show HN：我从零实现了一个 ISP 基础设施模拟器并自制 vBNG
items.summary_en: An open-source ISP emulator implements core carrier functions, including a custom virtual Broadband Network Gateway (vBNG), allowing operators and researchers to simulate subscriber, routing, and policy behaviors locally. It's useful for testing network changes, training, and reproducing carrier scenarios without access to physical gear.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源的 ISP 模拟器实现了核心运营商功能，并自制了虚拟宽带网络网关(vBNG)，可在本地模拟用户、路由与策略行为。它便于在没有实体设备的情况下进行网络变更测试、培训和运营场景复现。

items.title_en: 5,200 holes carved into a Peruvian mountain left by an ancient economy
items.title_zh: 秘鲁山上开凿的 5,200 个洞穴来自古代经济活动
items.summary_en: Archaeologists mapped some 5,200 small holes carved into a Peruvian mountainside and interpret them as the remnants of large-scale pre-Columbian extraction or storage activities. The pattern and scale point to organized labor and resource management, offering a window into the logistical complexity of ancient local economies.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家在秘鲁山坡上记录了约 5,200 个小洞，认为它们是大规模前哥伦布时期开采或存储活动的遗迹。洞穴的分布与规模表明存在有组织的劳力和资源管理，反映了古代地方经济的后勤复杂性。

items.title_en: Against vibes: When is a generative model useful
items.title_zh: 对‘氛围感’的反思：生成模型何时真正有用
items.summary_en: The blog argues that not all problems benefit from generative models and that practical usefulness comes when tasks are well-defined, with measurable inputs and outputs. It offers criteria to decide when to rely on AI instead of vibes.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为并非所有任务都适合生成模型，只有在目标清晰、可衡量输入输出时，AI 才真正有用。文中给出判定是否应依赖 AI 的实用标准。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Prism (YC X25) – Workspace and API to generate and edit videos
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Prism（YC X25）—— 生成与编辑视频的工作区与 API
items.summary_en: Prism offers a workspace and API that let developers generate and edit videos programmatically, likely leveraging AI to automate production tasks like cuts, overlays, and transformations. The service targets teams that want to integrate video creation into pipelines and apps, reducing manual editing overhead and enabling dynamic content generation at scale.
items.summary_zh: Prism 提供一个工作区和 API，使开发者能够以编程方式生成与编辑视频，可能借助 AI 自动化剪辑、叠加与转场等任务。该服务面向希望将视频创作融入工作流与应用的团队，降低人工编辑成本并支持大规模动态内容生成。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Sentrial (YC W26) – Catch AI agent failures before your users do
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Sentrial（YC W26）—— 在用户之前捕捉 AI 代理故障
items.summary_en: Sentrial provides monitoring and alerting tailored to AI agents, surfacing failures, regressions, and anomalous behavior before they impact end users. As agent-driven features proliferate, such observability layers become critical for reliability, safety enforcement, and root-cause analysis in production.
items.summary_zh: Sentrial 提供专为 AI 代理设计的监控与告警，及时发现故障、回退与异常行为以避免影响最终用户。随着代理驱动功能增多，这类可观测性层对生产环境的可靠性、安全执行与故障定位将变得至关重要。

items.title_en: Tested: How Many Times Can a DVD±RW Be Rewritten? Methodology and Results
items.title_zh: Tested：DVD±RW 可重写次数到底多少？方法学与结果
items.summary_en: The piece documents a rigorous methodology to measure rewrite endurance of DVD±RW media and reports that practical lifespans cluster around the low thousands of rewrites, with notable variation by disc and drive. The results provide a useful benchmark for archival use and legacy media planning.
items.summary_zh: 作者给出一套严格的方法来衡量 DVD±RW 的重写耐久性，结果显示实际寿命多在数千次级别，且因光盘和刻录机而异。这为档案保存和旧媒体的规划提供了有用的基准。

items.title_en: Datahäxan
items.title_zh: Datahäxan 数据女巫
items.summary_en: A gallery project titled Datahäxan presents data as magic, blending code, visuals, and storytelling to provoke thought about data's cultural role. It showcases interactive or visual pieces from 0dd.company's collection.
items.summary_zh: Datahäxan 是一个以数据为主题的展览，将数据视为魔法，通过代码与视觉表达讲述数据在当代科技中的作用与影响。作品集通过互动与视觉呈现挑战观众对数据的理解。

items.title_en: Six-Day and IP Address Certificates Available in Certbot
items.title_zh: Certbot 推出六日证书和 IP 地址证书
items.summary_en: Certbot now supports six-day certificates and IP address certificates, enabling faster rotation and use in environments without domain ownership. This expands automation options for internal networks, IoT, and testing environments while continuing to rely on ACME for issuance.
items.summary_zh: Certbot 现支持六日证书和 IP 地址证书，推动证书轮换更快并适用于无域名的场景。此更新扩展了内网、IoT 与测试环境的 TLS 自动化选项，同时与现有的 ACME 流程保持兼容。

items.title_en: Building a TB-303 from Scratch
items.title_zh: 从零开始打造 TB-303 合成器
items.summary_en: A hands‑on tutorial walks through building a TB-303-style bass synth from scratch, covering circuitry, component selection, and sequencing behavior. It's a practical resource for hardware synth builders and anyone interested in the analog design choices that produce the classic acid bass sound.
items.summary_zh: 这份动手教程逐步指导如何从零实现一个 TB-303 风格的低音合成器，涵盖电路设计、元件选择与步进序列器的行为。对硬件合成器爱好者和研究生成经典酸性低音音色的模拟设计细节的人来说非常实用。

items.title_en: Julia Snail – An Emacs Development Environment for Julia Like Clojure's Cider
items.title_zh: Julia Snail——为 Julia 提供的 Emacs 开发环境，类似 Clojure 的 Cider
items.summary_en: Julia Snail integrates Julia with Emacs to deliver an interactive, REPL-driven development workflow similar to Cider for Clojure. It brings enhanced tooling, inline docs, and a more ergonomic path for Julia developers.
items.summary_zh: Julia Snail 将 Julia 与 Emacs 结合，提供类似 Cider 的交互式开发工作流。它带来改进的工具链、内联文档以及更高效的 Julia 开发体验。

items.title_en: Printf-Tac-Toe
items.title_zh: Printf-井字棋
items.summary_en: A playful code-golf project that uses printf to implement a playable Tic-Tac-Toe game, showcasing how far C’s printf can be coaxed to handle logic and UI in a compact form.
items.summary_zh: 一个趣味性代码高博项目，利用 printf 实现一个可玩的井字棋，展示了在极简代码中如何让 C 的 printf 处理逻辑和界面。

items.title_en: WebPKI and You
items.title_zh: WebPKI 与你
items.summary_en: WebPKI underpins HTTPS through TLS and certificate chains, and the complexity of the ecosystem often surprises developers. The piece clarifies how WebPKI works, highlights common pitfalls, and offers practical steps for managing certificates, trust anchors, and secure deployments.
items.summary_zh: WebPKI 支撑着 HTTPS 的安全传输，证书与证书颁发机构的生态也相当复杂。文章讲解了 WebPKI 的工作原理、常见坑点，并给出管理证书、信任锚点和安全部署的实用要点。

items.title_en: NASA's DART spacecraft changed an asteroid's orbit around the sun
items.title_zh: NASA 的 DART 航天器改变了小行星绕太阳的轨道
items.summary_en: NASA's DART mission successfully altered an asteroid’s orbit via kinetic impact, marking a milestone in planetary defense and demonstrating a practical deflection technique for potentially hazardous bodies.
items.summary_zh: NASA 的 DART 任务通过动能撞击成功改变了小行星绕太阳的轨道，标志着行星防御的里程碑，并展示了对潜在威胁天体的实际偏转方法。

items.title_en: The Cost of Indirection in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 的间接性成本
items.summary_en: A deep dive into how abstractions and indirection affect Rust performance, balancing ergonomic code against runtime costs. Includes practical tips on choosing data structures and generics.
items.summary_zh: 深入分析抽象和间接性在 Rust 性能中的影响，平衡易用性与运行时成本，并给出在数据结构与泛型选择上的实用建议。

items.title_en: High fidelity font synthesis for CJK languages
items.title_zh: CJK 字体的高保真合成
items.summary_en: High-fidelity font synthesis for CJK scripts tackles font metrics, hinting, and glyph rendering quality, potentially leveraging ML or procedural methods. This work improves legibility and rendering across multilingual interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 面向 CJK 字体的高保真合成解决字体度量、 hinting 和字形渲染质量等问题，可能结合机器学习或过程化方法。提升跨语言界面的可读性与渲染效果。

items.title_en: About memory pressure, lock contention, and Data-oriented Design
items.title_zh: 关于内存压力、锁争用与数据导向设计
items.summary_en: It offers practical guidance on data layout and access patterns for performance-critical code.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析了内存压力和锁争用如何拖慢现代软件，主张数据导向设计能提升缓存局部性与吞吐量，并就数据布局与访问模式给出面向性能的实用建议。

items.title_en: CNN Explainer – Learn Convolutional Neural Network in Your Browser (2020)
items.title_zh: CNN Explainer：在浏览器中学习卷积神经网络（2020）
items.summary_en: An interactive, browser-based explainer that teaches CNN basics with visualizations and code. It’s a handy, self-contained resource for students and developers to grasp how filters, pooling, and feature maps work.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个在浏览器中运行的互动式 CNN 入门资源，配有可视化示例和示例代码，帮助学习卷积、池化、特征图等概念。

items.title_en: Show HN: Satellite imagery object detection using text prompts
items.title_zh: Show HN：使用文本提示进行卫星图像目标检测
items.summary_en: Show HN demo demonstrating satellite imagery object detection guided by text prompts, highlighting how language-conditioned models can steer geospatial analysis. The approach hints at rapid prototyping for analysts and potential misuse in mislabeling or surveillance concerns.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了通过文本提示引导的卫星影像目标检测，展示了语言条件模型在地理空间分析中的应用潜力。此类方法能加快分析原型，但也带来错标和监控等风险。

items.title_en: Galaxy Zoo
items.title_zh: 银河星云志
items.summary_en: Galaxy Zoo crowdsources galaxy classifications to accelerate astronomical research, leveraging public participation to build large labeled datasets. The project exemplifies citizen science at scale and the value of public engagement in science.
items.summary_zh: Galaxy Zoo 利用公众参与来对星系进行分类，加速天文研究，汇聚海量标注数据。这一公民科学项目在规模化方面展现了公众参与科学的价值。

items.title_en: What Happens After You Die? (2016)
items.title_zh: 死后会怎样？（2016）
items.summary_en: A reflective piece on death that traverses biological realities, cultural beliefs, and personal meaning, prompting readers to consider how technology shapes our approach to mortality and legacy.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于死亡的反思性文章，探讨生物学、文化与存在的意义，以及科技时代人们如何面对死亡与遗产的问题。

items.title_en: Thinnings: Sublist Witnesses and de Bruijn Index Shift Clumping
items.title_zh: Thinnings：子集 Witnesses 与 de Bruijn 指数移位聚类
items.summary_en: Thinnings explores theoretical computer science topics like sublist witnesses and De Bruijn index shifting, delving into formal methods and language theory. The post appeals to readers interested in the mathematical foundations of programming languages.
items.summary_zh: Thinnings 讨论子集证人和 De Bruijn 指数移位等理论计算机科学主题，深入正式方法与语言理论。适合对编程语言的数学基础感兴趣的读者。

items.title_en: Show HN: Web-based ANSI art viewer
items.title_zh: Show HN: 基于网页的 ANSI 字符画查看器
items.summary_en: A browser-based app that renders ANSI art directly in the page, with interactive features and export options, lowering the barrier to enjoying retro terminal art online.
items.summary_zh: 一个在浏览器中直接渲染 ANSI 字符画的应用，具备交互功能和导出选项，使在线欣赏复古终端艺术更加易用。

items.title_en: DDR4 Sdram – Initialization, Training and Calibration
items.title_zh: DDR4 SDRAM 初始化、训练与校准
items.summary_en: A technical guide to DDR4 memory initialization sequences, training routines, and calibration procedures essential for reliability and overclocking insights.
items.summary_zh: DDR4 内存的初始化序列、训练过程与校准方法的技术指南，关乎可靠性与超频性能。

items.title_en: Full Spectrum and Infrared Photography
items.title_zh: 全光谱与红外摄影
items.summary_en: A look at capturing images across the full spectrum, including infrared, and the techniques and gear involved. These modalities reveal details invisible to standard photography.
items.summary_zh: 探讨覆盖全光谱的摄影方法，包括红外线拍摄，以及相关技巧与装备。这些拍摄模式能揭示常规摄影看不到的细节。

items.title_en: Challenging the Single-Responsibility Principle
items.title_zh: 挑战单一职责原则
items.summary_en: Challenging the Single-Responsibility Principle, the post argues for pragmatic boundaries—sometimes related concerns deserve a shared module to reduce noise and improve maintainability. It advocates balancing cohesion and simplicity based on real-world change patterns.
items.summary_zh: 挑战单一职责原则，文章主张在实际开发中应采用更具务实性的边界，避免过度拆分导致的噪声。强调在现实需求的变更模式下，保持相关职责在同一模块内往往有利于可维护性和理解性。

items.title_en: The purpose of Continuous Integration is to fail
items.title_zh: 持续集成的目的在于失败
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing CI should fail fast to surface breakages and protect downstream quality. It discusses flaky tests and the importance of reliable feedback loops to keep software healthy.
items.summary_zh: 这篇观点文章提出，持续集成的核心在于快速暴露问题并防止质量下降。文中讨论了易出错的测试、以及高效、可靠的反馈循环对保持软件健康的重要性。

items.title_en: Newcomb's Paradox Needs a Demon
items.title_zh: Newcomb 悖论需要一个恶魔
items.summary_en: A take on Newcomb’s paradox arguing for modeling predictors or decisions in a demon-like construct, offering a lens to rethink decision theory. The post dives into how to formalize prediction-based decision scenarios.
items.summary_zh: 对 Newcomb 悖论的讨论主张用类似恶魔的构造来建模预测者，从而提供对决策理论的新视角。文章探讨了将基于预测的场景形式化的问题。
